channel.title: Kelvin Education on RaihnForge
channel.description: Recent content in Kelvin Education on RaihnForge

item.title: Agile Manifesto Values and Principles
item.description: The Agile Manifesto provides a foundational framework for agile project management, emphasizing adaptability, collaboration, and a customer-focused approach. It comprises four core values and twelve principles. Below, each is described and contextualized with examples from personal project experience. An acronym for AGILE proposed by Roula Lombardi is Adapt continually, Groom your requirements and refinements for release of features, Iterate through two-to-four-week scrum cycles, Launch and learn through deployment, and Empower your scrum teams (Lombardi, 2020).
